series_metadata.series_title: Public Utility Excise Gross Receipts and Related Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: Annual statements of Gross Receipts for natural gas pipelines, oil pipelines, water works & Water transport compaines and related statements, schedules, taxing district recaps, FERC reports, PUCO reports, appraisals, pictures, maps, assessment certificates, transmittals, documentation and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 5 yrs from the date of assessment. ; Electronic: Destroy 5 yrs from the date of assessment., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
